purpose: Supplies process gases (nitrogen and silane) with controlled flow rates and purge capabilities for semiconductor manufacturing processes

outputs.name: nitrogen_flow_rate
outputs.description: Nitrogen flow rate through delivery system

outputs.name: silane_flow_rate
outputs.description: Silane flow rate through delivery system

states.name: filter_clog_level
states.description: Level of particle accumulation in inline gas filters (0=clean, 1=fully clogged)

states.name: valve_corrosion_level
states.description: Corrosion level of valve components from gas exposure (1=healthy, 0=severely corroded)

events.name: low_pressure_alarm
events.description: Pressure is low after the gas system due to flow restriction

events.name: no_flow_condition
events.description: No gas flow through system due to complete blockage or valve failure

events.name: high_limit_alarm
events.description: Flow exceeds high limit threshold due to valve degradation

events.name: system_error
events.description: Severe error condition in flow device due to multiple degradation modes

events.name: valve_drive_alarm
events.description: Valve drive level exceeds maximum due to increased resistance from corrosion

parameters.name: max_filter_capacity
parameters.description: Maximum filter clog level before complete blockage

parameters.name: valve_corrosion_timescale
parameters.description: Time constant for valve corrosion degradation

parameters.name: nominal_n2_flow
parameters.description: Nominal nitrogen flow rate when healthy

parameters.name: nominal_silane_flow
parameters.description: Nominal silane flow rate when healthy

parameters.name: low_pressure_threshold
parameters.description: Filter clog level threshold for low pressure alarm

parameters.name: no_flow_clog_threshold
parameters.description: Filter clog level threshold for no flow condition

parameters.name: no_flow_corrosion_threshold
parameters.description: Valve corrosion level threshold for no flow condition

parameters.name: high_limit_threshold
parameters.description: Valve corrosion level threshold for high flow alarm

parameters.name: system_error_clog_threshold
parameters.description: Filter clog level threshold for system error

parameters.name: system_error_corrosion_threshold
parameters.description: Valve corrosion level threshold for system error

parameters.name: valve_drive_threshold
parameters.description: Valve corrosion level threshold for drive alarm

state_transition_logic: filter_clog_level increases by filter_clog_rate * dt when gas is flowing, clamped to [0.0, max_filter_capacity]
valve_corrosion_level decreases by (1/valve_corrosion_timescale) * valve_usage_factor * dt when valves are active, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
output_logic: nitrogen_flow_rate = nominal_n2_flow * (1 - filter_clog_level) * valve_corrosion_level when n2_purge_valve is true, else 0
silane_flow_rate = nominal_silane_flow * (1 - filter_clog_level) * valve_corrosion_level when process_valve is true, else 0
purge_time = nominal_purge_time / valve_corrosion_level when n2_purge_valve is true, accounting for reduced valve efficiency
event_logic: no_flow_condition occurs when filter_clog_level > no_flow_clog_threshold OR valve_corrosion_level < no_flow_corrosion_threshold
system_error occurs when filter_clog_level > system_error_clog_threshold AND valve_corrosion_level < system_error_corrosion_threshold
assumptions: Filter clogging is primarily driven by gas flow and particle accumulation
Valve corrosion occurs continuously when valves are in use
Flow rates are proportionally reduced by both filter clogging and valve degradation
Purge time increases as valve efficiency decreases due to corrosion
Gas composition and environmental conditions remain within normal operating ranges
